content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_InvoicedReturns
-- Drop view BI_InvoicedReturns

AS

SELECT
    TRY_CAST(
            LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 4) + '-' + 
            SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 5, 2) + '-' + 
            RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), H.IVDT), 2) AS DATE) AS [Invoice Date],
    H.YEA4 AS [Year],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.EXIN) AS [Extended Invoice Number],
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(20),H.IVNO) AS [Invoice Number],
    H.ORNO AS [Order Number],
    H.ORTP AS [Order Type],
    H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
    H.PYNO AS [Payer],
    L.ITNO AS [Item Number],
    L.PONR AS [Order Line],
    L.POSX AS [Line Suffix],
    L.LNCL AS [Line Classification],
    L.IVQT AS [Qty],
    L.SAPR AS [Unit Price],
    L.UCOS AS [Unit Cost],
    CASE WHEN L.LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE (L.IVQT * L.SAPR * H.RAIN) END AS [Dollar Amount],
    CASE WHEN L.LNCL = 2 THEN 0 ELSE L.DCOS END AS [Total Cost],
    L.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
    L.CUOR AS [Customer PO],
    L.DLIX AS [Delivery Number],
    O.REPN AS [Receiving Number],
    O.SERN AS [Serial Number],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE O.RSCD END AS [Transaction Reason],
    CASE WHEN O.RSCD IS NULL OR O.RSCD = '' THEN 'NA' ELSE C.TX40 END AS [Transaction Reason Description],
    R.YREF AS [Reference],
    R.RORN AS [Reference Sales Order Number]

FROM M3.ODHEAD H
LEFT JOIN M3.ODLINE L ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO AND H.EXIN = L.EXIN AND H.DLIX = L.DLIX
LEFT JOIN M3.OOLINE O ON L.ORNO = O.ORNO AND L.PONR = O.PONR AND L.POSX = O.POSX
LEFT JOIN M3.OCHEAD R ON O.REPN = R.REPN
LEFT JOIN M3.CSYTAB C ON O.RSCD = C.STKY AND C.STCO = 'RSCD'

WHERE
    H.IVNO <> 0 AND
    H.YEA4 >= '2022' AND
    H.ORTP IN ('RMA','X90','E90')
